title: SMITE®

notes: Works but only if you copy the eac from paladins. Install both games, launch them borh (cancel any dotnet intall prompt). Paladins will run, Smite will close itself. Go to /home/YOURUSERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Paladins/Binaries/EasyAntiCheat/ copy everything but the launcher folder to /home/YOURUSERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/SMITE/Binaries/EasyAntiCheat/ (overwrite). Now from /home/YOURUSERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/SMITE/Binaries/EasyAntiCheat/ copy the 2 dll files to /home/YOURUSERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/SMITE/Binaries/Win32/EasyAntiCheat/ and /home/YOURUSERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/SMITE/Binaries/Win64/EasyAntiCheat/ (overwrite). At this point smite should run but first use protontricks to install dotnet40 for both games (smite and paladins or just smite if u don't plan on keeping/playing paladins) and change the windows version to windows7.

notes:
Works if you replace the EAC dlls in Smite with the the ones from paladins 
The dlls for smite that need replaced are located in
Smite/Binaries/EasyAntiCheat 
Smite/Binaries/Win32/EasyAntiCheat
Smite/Binaries/Win64/EasyAntiCheat
And the dlls that you use from palidans are called 
(EasyAntiCheat_x64.dll & EasyAntiCheatx86.dll)
located in
Paladins/Bianaries/EasyAntiCheat
You also need to install dotnet40 & vcrun2010from protontricks or something like it
Setting the launch options in steam to
PROTON_VARIABLE = 1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC
Also gave me a huge performance boost as well as making sure to not check dx11 in game.

Why doesn't Smite get that kinda love?

notes: Game runs great after some actions. I've copied all of the EAC dlls from different folders of Paladins game to same folders in Smite, also through protontricks i've installed(some of them probably unnecessarily): d3dx10_43, d3dx11_43, d3dx9_43, dotnet45, dotnet46, dotnet472, dxdiagn, dxdiag, dxvk, vcrun2013, vcrun2015, vcrun2017. Got a few errors while insalling those but it suddenly worked. In game I haven't select dx11 and run first three games in windowed mode and on a third i additionaly switched to fullscreen mode.
title: SMITE®

notes:
As stated below: "Works if you replace the EAC dlls in Smite with the the ones from paladins The dlls for smite that need replaced are located in Smite/Binaries/EasyAntiCheat Smite/Binaries/Win32/EasyAntiCheat Smite/Binaries/Win64/EasyAntiCheat And the dlls that you use from palidans are called (EasyAntiCheat_x64.dll & EasyAntiCheatx86.dll) located in Paladins/Bianaries/EasyAntiCheat You also need to install dotnet40 & vcrun2010 from protontricks"

1. Install protontricks from https://github.com/Matoking/protontricks#pipx-recommended
2. Use "protontricks 386360 dotnet40" command to install .NET 4.0
3. Use "protontricks 386360 vcrun2010" command to install VC Redist 2010
4. Run SMITE from Steam

If you don't have connection to server, use VPN ("https://windscribe.com/guides/linux#how-to" with free 10Gb traffic).
